action_buttons.visited_hint: Danna don cire alamar ziyarar ka
action_buttons.mark_visited_hint: Yana ɗaukar ziyarar ka kuma yana buɗe hanyar bita
action_buttons.error_save: An kasa ajiye katin. Da fatan a sake gwadawa.
action_buttons.error_login: Dole ne ka shiga don shirya katuna.
action_buttons.error_invalid_date: Ranar da ka zaɓa ba ta dace ba. Da fatan a sake gwadawa.
action_buttons.schedule_failed_body: Ba mu iya ƙara wannan zuwa kalandar ka. Da fatan a sake gwadawa.
action_buttons.place_closed_body: Wannan wurin an rufe shi a ranar da lokacin da ka zaɓa. Da fatan a zaɓi lokaci daban.
action_buttons.scheduled_toast: An shirya! An matsar da {{title}} zuwa kalandar ka
action_buttons.closed_message: An rufe wannan wurin a ranar da lokacin da ka zaɓa. Danna "Shirya" don zaɓi lokaci daban.

match_factors.title: Bayani na Daidaitawa
match_factors.summary: Waɗannan abubuwa suna ƙayyade yadda wannan gogewar ta dace da zaɓin ka. Maki mafi girma suna nuna dacewa mafi kyau.

companion_stops.title: Fara Yawo
companion_stops.subtitle: Fara a ɗaya daga cikin waɗannan wuraren kusa kafin tafiya
